home.description: Dejpa Laboratory, as a specialized laboratory for various types of bitumen and petroleum materials, with advanced equipment and experienced technical staff, provides testing and quality control services for various types of bitumen and petroleum materials in accordance with national and international standards. This laboratory holds a valid ISO/IEC 17025 certification and operates as a partner laboratory with the Standards Administration. Accuracy in testing, reliability of results, and commitment to quality are fundamental principles of Dejpa Laboratory in providing services to road construction industries and civil engineering projects.

bitumen.title: Bitumen Laboratory Services
bitumen.description:
Dejpa Laboratory provides specialized testing and quality control services for various types of bitumen in accordance with Iranian national standards from INSO 12505-1 to INSO 12505-12, as well as valid international standards. All tests are conducted using calibrated equipment, valid testing methods, and under the supervision of the laboratory's quality management system.

Bitumen tests at this laboratory are conducted based on Iranian national standards developed by the Institute of Standards and Industrial Research of Iran and in compliance with ASTM and EN standard requirements. The selection of testing methods is based on the type of bitumen, sample specifications, project requirements, and client requests.

Test result reports at Dejpa Laboratory are prepared with full compliance with technical requirements and standard reporting structure, and have the capability to provide results in both Persian and English. These reports are technically fully reliable for executive organizations, consultants, contractors, and domestic and international projects, and accuracy, transparency, and full compliance with reference standards are among the main features of this laboratory's services.

testing.title: Bitumen Testing
testing.description: Evaluation of bitumen samples using the most advanced equipment and based on ISO standards
features: Determination of flash and fire points with Cleveland open cup apparatus
Determination of softening point of bitumen with ring and ball apparatus
Determination of penetration
Bituminous materials spot test
Determination of ductility
Effect of heat and air on bituminous materials (TFOT)
Determination of kinematic viscosity of bitumens
Determination of viscosity of bitumens using vacuum capillary viscometer
Effect of heat and air on a moving film of bitumen (RTFOT - Rolling Thin Film Oven Test)
Distillation of cutback bitumens
Determination of bitumen viscosity using Brookfield rotating viscometer
Determination of flexural creep stiffness of bitumen with Bending Beam Rheometer (BBR)
Determination of rheological properties of bitumen with Dynamic Shear Rheometer (DSR)
Accelerated aging of bitumen by Pressure Aging Vessel (PAV)
Determination of penetration and recovery (elastic recovery)
Determination of solubility of bituminous materials in trichloroethylene
Determination of flash point of cutback bitumens using Tag open cup apparatus
Determination of water content
Flash point measurement with Pensky-Martens closed cup apparatus
100% penetration residue
Determination of density of semi-solid bituminous materials (pycnometer method)
Determination of Fraass breaking point of bitumen and bituminous materials
Determination of bitumen emulsion viscosity with Saybolt-Furol viscometer
Sedimentation and storage stability of bituminous emulsions
Determination of breaking of bituminous emulsions
Coating ability of aggregates and water resistance
Mixing of bitumen emulsion with cement
Determination of oversize particles in bituminous emulsions (sieve test)
Distillation of bitumen emulsion
Determination of particle charge
Determination of density of solid and semi-solid bituminous materials (nickel crucible method)
Determination of ash content
Pour point measurement
Measurement of carbon residue and petroleum products by Conradson method
Distillation under reduced pressure

bitumen.cta: We are ready to evaluate your bitumen samples

about.title: About Dejpa Laboratory
about.subtitle: Trust and Quality in Every Test
about.description:
Dejpa Laboratory, as a specialized bitumen laboratory, with years of professional experience in conducting tests and quality control of various types of bitumen, provides its services based on technical knowledge, advanced equipment, and specialized human resources. This laboratory, with its extensive physical space and appropriate laboratory infrastructure, has enabled the installation of diverse equipment and simultaneous testing, thereby facilitating rapid and accurate response to the needs of large civil engineering projects.

All tests at Dejpa Laboratory are conducted in accordance with national and international standards and with full compliance with technical requirements. This facility holds a valid ISO/IEC 17025 certification and operates as a partner laboratory with the Standards Administration. Furthermore, Dejpa Laboratory has been selected as a Grade 1 partner laboratory for consecutive years, which demonstrates the high level of technical capability, quality performance, and reliability of the test results issued.

Accuracy in testing, reliability and credibility of results, commitment to quality, and compliance with legal requirements are fundamental principles of this laboratory. Dejpa Laboratory, relying on its technical and physical capacities, has always served as a reliable reference for executive organizations, consultants, and contractors in road construction and civil engineering projects.
about.missionText: Providing specialized testing and quality control services for various types of bitumen and petroleum materials using advanced equipment and experienced technical staff, in accordance with national and international standards with accuracy, reliability of results, and commitment to quality
about.visionText: Becoming a reliable and leading reference for executive organizations, consultants, and contractors in road construction and civil engineering projects
